requirements.task_name: Use the size guide to reserve the next larger unit under $150/month for a 1-bedroom apartment
requirements.task_description: Use the size calculator for a 1-bedroom apartment with at least five items selected, take the recommended size, then pick the next larger size and reserve the cheapest unit of that size near ZIP 30309 for ≤ $150/month.
existing_variables: // rules mapping property_type + required_items to recommended unit_size_id
// labels, sort_order used to determine 'next larger' size
// to verify search near ZIP 30309 via searchLocationsForUnitSize

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever calculateRecommendedUnitSize(propertyType, selectedItemKeys) is called AND propertyType === '1_bedroom_apartment' AND Array.isArray(selectedItemKeys) && selectedItemKeys.length >= 5.
required_variables.reason: This persists the user’s size-guide inputs for Task 3 so the evaluator can: (1) confirm that the size guide was used with the correct property type (1-bedroom apartment) and at least five checklist items; (2) recompute the recommended unit size using size_guide_rules; and (3) compare the recommended size to the reserved unit’s size (via reservations → units → unit_sizes) to verify that the reserved size is the next larger size than recommended and that the reserved unit is the cheapest available of that size under $150/month near ZIP 30309.
